tweets.text: This week, the United States took actions to hold #Russia accountable, #UNSC addressed the situation in #Syria, @USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley discussed the UN #peacekeeping budget, and leaders convened for the Tashkent Conference on #Afghanistan.
